name: ssh-exec
description: Remote command execution sshfs mounting over OpenSSH

interface.shortDescription: Find SSH hosts, run remote commands, mount remote files over OpenSSH.
interface.longDescription: SSH Exec provides three tools: host discovering configured remote hosts, mount mounting remote host locally so Codex can use built-in file tools, and exec remote commands such inspection, verification, service control.
interface.defaultPrompt: If you are not sure whether remote host alias exists, use host first. Use mount before editing remote files, then use exec to inspect or verify remote host.
